overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay footage from a samurai video game showing a character in red traditional armor and a straw hat exiting a wooden temple interior with ornate painted ceilings into a heavy rainstorm, then walking through a Japanese garden with stone lanterns and a torii gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple interior with ornate painted ceilings and folding screens

agents.ego_description: standing inside the temple, looking up at the ornate ceiling and observing the painted wall screens

entered.detail: intricate wooden ceiling with geometric patterns and decorative paintings
large wall panels with traditional Japanese landscape paintings
thick dark wooden structural columns supporting the temple roof
wooden lattice doors with paper panels leading to the exterior

segments.scene_description: The character stands inside a traditional wooden temple, surrounded by ornate painted ceilings and folding screens. The interior is dimly lit with natural light filtering through the shoji doors, creating a serene atmosphere as the character observes the detailed architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple entrance veranda transitioning to exterior garden

events.description: character approaches the open doorway, bright natural light floods the dim interior
character steps out of the temple into the heavy rainstorm

agents.ego_description: walking toward the temple exit, moving from the painted interior toward the bright doorway and the rainy exterior beyond

entered.detail: wooden deck flooring at the temple entrance, wet from rain
view through the doorway showing trees and garden in the rain
heavy rain falling outside visible through the open doorway

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the temple toward the exit, passing the painted screens as bright light from the doorway grows stronger. Stepping onto the wooden veranda, the heavy rain becomes visible outside, and the character transitions from the sheltered interior to the exposed garden.

scene_state.functional_zone: Japanese temple garden with stone pathways and torii gate in heavy rain

events.description: heavy rain intensifies as character walks further into the open garden
character turns slightly right to follow the path toward the red torii gate

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet garden path through the heavy rain, passing stone lanterns and approaching the red torii gate

entered.detail: muddy stone pathway with puddles reflecting the rainy sky
traditional Japanese stone lanterns lining the garden path
large vermillion torii gate marking the sacred entrance
traditional wooden temple structures with tiled roofs
lush green trees and shrubs surrounding the garden path

segments.scene_description: Now fully outside in the heavy rain, the character walks along the wet garden path surrounded by dense foliage and traditional temple architecture. The character passes stone lanterns and approaches a prominent red torii gate, with rain visibly falling all around and creating reflections on the wet ground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the serene, dimly lit interior of a traditional temple into a heavy, atmospheric rainstorm. It begins amidst ornate painted ceilings and folding screens, where soft natural light filters through shoji doors. As the character moves toward the exit, the light from the doorway intensifies, leading the camera onto a wooden veranda where the sudden presence of falling rain becomes visible. The scene then shifts fully outdoors, following the character along a wet garden path surrounded by dense foliage and stone lanterns. Finally, the camera tracks the character through the downpour toward a prominent red torii gate, with the rain creating deep reflections on the saturated ground.
